narrative:
Worth 4-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 488 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
